scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace app
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace app
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace app && npm run lint --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace app
